steps.title: Look for a contrast
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize a difference between two sculptures. The relevant notes contrast Hartley's phrase-spelling sculpture with Lin's abstract squiggle shape.

steps.title: Choose the shape contrast
steps.content: The matching option directly contrasts a sculpture that spells out a phrase with one that forms an abstract squiggle. Choice A and Choice C describe shared use of neon, and Choice D says both works are sculptures, so they emphasize similarity instead. The answer is B.
